creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
Observed in poudriere, reproducible since 469834

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: bin/%%GCC_TARGET%%-gcov-dump
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/%%GCC_TARGET%%-gcov-dump.1.gz
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/%%GCC_TARGET%%-gcov-tool.1.gz
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/aarch64-none-elf-gcc
=>> Error: check-plist failures detected
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir

Not sure of the fix to this one; whether these pieces are needed or not.
